---
title: "Visit to NVIDIA Voyager"
description: "Mudd Job Shadow"
author: ""
date: "3/17/26"
categories:
  - Job Shadow
  - NVIDIA
draft: false
---
![](images/nvidia.jpeg)

This week, I had the incredible opportunity to job shadow at NVIDIA's [NVIDIA's](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/) headquarters in Santa Clara with Mudd alumni Alisha Chulani! It was really cool to see what the workplace looks like day-to-day at such a large company, and it was fascinating watch teams collaborate on some exciting projects. So grateful for the experience!
